headline: Is Expeditors International of Washington (EXPD) Fairly Priced After Strong One Year Share Gains?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Expeditors International of Washington is priced fairly at recent levels, or if the current share price is leaving some value on the table. The stock last closed at US$145.81, with returns of 2.2% over 7 days, a 1.5% decline over 30 days, a 4.0% decline year to date, and gains of 33.4% over 1 year and 43.5% and 42.3% over 3 and 5 years respectively. Recent market attention has focused on Expeditors as a key player in global freight forwarding and logistics,...
